payload.description:
## Summary
Reuse the dashboard's existing warning/alert presentation patterns for evaluation-level misclassification red flags.

## Deliverables
- Surface evaluation-level flags using an established warning/error visual treatment.
- Keep the visual treatment coherent with existing dashboard report and evaluation warning patterns.
- Define how multiple flags are summarized without overwhelming the evaluation view.
payload.title: Reuse dashboard warning/alert components for evaluation-level red flags
